status.description: The configured status of the campaign

effective_status.description: The effective status of the campaign taking into account parent statuses and schedule.

daily_budget.description: Daily budget amount in account currency smallest unit

lifetime_budget.description: Lifetime budget amount in account currency smallest unit

special_ad_categories.description: Special ad categories required for housing, employment, credit, or social issues ads.

created_time.description: Time when the campaign was created

updated_time.description: Time when the campaign was last updated

start_time.description: Scheduled start time of the campaign

stop_time.description: Scheduled stop time of the campaign
